expectations.text: No more than 5 consecutive words match the original
expectations.evidence: Original: 'the proposed method is better than existing approaches' → 'the proposed method outperforms current approaches' - 'the proposed method' matches 3 consecutive words

expectations.text: Uses more advanced vocabulary (e.g., demonstrates, superior, notable)
expectations.evidence: Uses outperforms, better, obtains, considerable - basic vocabulary, not significantly advanced
